mutation.explanation: Some dose pairs pass global mutation+viability thresholds, but at least one tissue fails under strict finish-line criteria.

fucci.explanation: S-phase fold and leakage meet thresholds at one or more dose pairs.

washout.explanation: Required washout rows pass finite-CI, retention-at-horizon, and predictive holdout checks.

synergy.explanation: Bootstrap stability supports a consistent optimum under viability constraints.

gate_definitions.mutation_rule: exists dose: lower95(mutation_reduction)>=2 and lower95(viability)>=viability_threshold and all tissues meet same rule
gate_definitions.washout_rule: for each required tissue/mark (on-mark only unless gate_off_mark_required=true): finite half-life CI, finite_fraction>=0.95, lower95(retained_effect_at_horizon)>=washout_retention_min, and predictive holdout quality check
